name: FRANCIS PAUL AMADEO
summary: A Full Stack Software Engineer with experience in Learning Management Systems and Internal Tools and a strong focus on process optimization. For freelance and professional opportunities, [connect on LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/franpaul) or [send me an email](/#/contact).
bio:
Hi! I have two first names and build customized software solutions that make people's daily work a little less tedious. But I'll leave that to the [at work](/#/) section. 

 I am a serial learner: the kind of person who enjoys diving into music rabbit holes after dinner then goes to bed 3 hours after bedtime with twenty one <sup>|-/(kek)</sup> new subgenres, each with a new favorite band. I love good poetry and great lyrics that will make you pause and listen again. (*See entirety of "**Complainers**" by Rudy Francisco*) 

 I'm the kind of person that watches quiz shows, like *Only Connect*, *Lateral with Tom Scott* and *Jeopardy!* because it makes me feel smart and dumb at the same time. I love learning how things connect, which is probably why I enjoy making software. :D 

 I am a devout catholic who's been taught **It'll all work out as He intended, as long as I do my best.** 
 Not because  everything goes right, but because showing up, staying curious and a willingness to adapt to any situation will guide me even when it doesn't. If any of this resonates, [I'd love to hear from you](/#/contact)

Music: Ang Pag-Ibig ay Kanibalismo II — fitterkarma
Books: No Matter The Wreckage — Sarah Kay
Clean Code — Robert C. Martin (Currently Reading)
